# Chart of Accounts — Riverside Cafe LLC

## Asset Accounts (1000s)

| Account # | Name | Type | Notes |
|-----------|------|------|-------|
| 1010 | OnPoint Business Checking | Bank | Primary operating account |
| 1020 | OnPoint Business Savings | Bank | Reserve fund, target 3 months operating expenses |
| 1100 | Accounts Receivable | Current Asset | Catering invoices, corporate accounts |
| 1200 | Inventory — Food | Current Asset | Perishable inventory, counted weekly |
| 1210 | Inventory — Beverage | Current Asset | Coffee beans, tea, milk, juices |
| 1220 | Inventory — Supplies | Current Asset | Paper goods, cleaning supplies, to-go containers |
| 1300 | Prepaid Expenses | Current Asset | Insurance premiums, annual software subscriptions |
| 1500 | Furniture & Equipment | Fixed Asset | Kitchen equipment, espresso machine, furniture |
| 1510 | Accumulated Depreciation | Contra Asset | MACRS depreciation, 5-year and 7-year schedules |
| 1600 | Leasehold Improvements | Fixed Asset | 2024 kitchen renovation ($32,000), amortized over lease term |

## Liability Accounts (2000s)

| Account # | Name | Type | Notes |
|-----------|------|------|-------|
| 2010 | Accounts Payable | Current Liability | Vendor invoices (food suppliers, utilities) |
| 2100 | Credit Card Payable | Current Liability | Chase Ink Business Preferred balance |
| 2200 | Payroll Liabilities | Current Liability | Withheld taxes, benefits deductions |
| 2300 | Sales Tax Payable | Current Liability | Oregon has no sales tax — used only for catering in WA |
| 2400 | SBA Loan Payable | Long-term Liability | SBA 7(a) loan, $85,000 remaining, 6.5% interest, matures 2031 |

## Equity Accounts (3000s)

| Account # | Name | Notes |
|-----------|------|-------|
| 3000 | Owner's Equity | Initial capital contribution |
| 3100 | Owner's Draws/Distributions | S-Corp distributions beyond salary |
| 3200 | Retained Earnings | Cumulative undistributed profits |

## Revenue Accounts (4000s)

| Account # | Name | Notes |
|-----------|------|-------|
| 4010 | Dine-in Revenue | Breakfast and lunch service |
| 4020 | To-Go Revenue | Counter and online orders |
| 4030 | Catering Revenue | Corporate events, private parties |
| 4040 | Beverage Revenue — Coffee | Espresso drinks, drip coffee, cold brew |
| 4050 | Beverage Revenue — Other | Juice, tea, smoothies |
| 4060 | Retail Revenue | Packaged coffee beans, merchandise |

## Cost of Goods Sold (5000s)

| Account # | Name | Target % |
|-----------|------|----------|
| 5010 | Food Cost | 28-32% of food revenue |
| 5020 | Beverage Cost — Coffee | 18-22% of coffee revenue |
| 5030 | Beverage Cost — Other | 25-30% of other beverage revenue |
| 5040 | Packaging & Supplies | 3-4% of total revenue |

## Operating Expenses (6000s)

| Account # | Name | Monthly Budget |
|-----------|------|---------------|
| 6010 | Payroll — Wages | $18,000 |
| 6020 | Payroll — Taxes & Benefits | $3,600 |
| 6030 | Rent | $4,200 |
| 6040 | Utilities (electric, gas, water) | $1,100 |
| 6050 | Insurance (GL, property, workers' comp) | $650 |
| 6060 | Marketing & Advertising | $400 |
| 6070 | Repairs & Maintenance | $300 |
| 6080 | Professional Fees (accounting, legal) | $700 |
| 6090 | Software & Technology | $250 |
| 6100 | Depreciation & Amortization | $850 |
| 6110 | Office & Administrative | $150 |
| 6120 | Licenses & Permits | $100 |
